rows.notes: README keeps the narrow-scope guardrails explicit.
README now describes the active post-P7 stabilization package rather than an unspecified later planning pass.
STATUS records the post-P7 stabilization package rather than pointing only to a later plan-mode pass.
Publication record README names both the approved short-update source and the active post-P7 control docs.
The release summary stays narrow and current while naming the active post-P7 package explicitly.
The manuscript now reads as a section-ordered draft instead of carrying a phase-status preamble.
The layout decision log should record release-summary reuse plus the new post-P7 governance choices.
The completed P7 digest and handoff should remain explicit as the frozen baseline for the current stage.
